faq.question: Is a landing page suitable for an architecture firm or only for individuals?
faq.answer: Suitable for both. AI adapts the structure and tone for a private architect or an architecture firm with a team.

faq.question: Can I show 3D visualizations on the landing page?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload images of any format: photos of completed projects, 3D visualizations, drawings — the gallery supports all content types.

faq.question: How to describe architect services on the landing page?
faq.answer: Promto automatically generates a services section based on your description. You can edit texts to match your actual offerings.

faq.question: Can I specify my work geography?
faq.answer: Yes. Specify cities and regions where you work — this helps attract target clients from relevant locations through search engines.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. Describe your activity — the system creates a ready landing page with texts, design, and structure in minutes.

faq.question: How much does an architect landing page cost?
faq.answer: You can create a basic landing page for free. Paid plans add custom domain, visitor analytics, and additional sections.
